description: Dr. Henry Smith Clinic was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the New York community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Founded in 2006, Flushing Acupuncture emerged from Dr. Jiang's deep commitment to bringing authentic Traditional Chinese Medicine to the vibrant, multicultural community of Flushing, New York. Having witnessed the profound healing potential of TCM during her own family's health journey, Dr. Jiang was inspired to create a sanctuary where ancient wisdom meets modern wellness needs.

For eighteen years, our clinic has become a cornerstone of holistic health in Queens, serving patients from all walks of life who seek natural, effective alternatives to conventional treatments. We've watched children grow into adults, supported families through health challenges, and celebrated countless healing victories alongside our patients.

Rooted in the rich cultural tapestry of Flushing, we honor both traditional Chinese healing practices and the diverse healthcare needs of our community. Our bilingual approach ensures that every patient feels understood and comfortable, whether they prefer to communicate in English or Chinese, creating a bridge between Eastern wisdom and Western accessibility.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Dr. Jiang began her journey in Traditional Chinese Medicine over two decades ago, earning her Master of Science in Traditional Chinese Medicine from the American College of Traditional Chinese Medicine in San Francisco in 2000. This prestigious program provided her with both classical TCM training and the clinical skills needed to practice effectively in the United States. She holds board certification from the National Certification Commission for Acupuncture and Oriental Medicine (NCCAOM), maintaining the highest standards of professional excellence.

With twenty years of clinical experience, Dr. Jiang has developed particular expertise in pain management, mental health support, and women's health issues. Her compassionate approach to treating anxiety and panic disorders has helped countless patients find peace and balance in their daily lives. She specializes in respiratory conditions and immune system strengthening, drawing upon time-tested herbal formulas and acupuncture protocols that address the root causes of illness rather than merely treating symptoms.

Dr. Jiang's treatment philosophy centers on the fundamental TCM principle that the body possesses an innate wisdom to heal itself when properly supported. She combines classical diagnostic methods—including pulse and tongue diagnosis—with personalized treatment plans that may incorporate acupuncture, custom herbal prescriptions, dietary guidance, and lifestyle recommendations. Her gentle, intuitive approach helps patients reconnect with their body's natural healing rhythms while addressing both physical symptoms and emotional wellbeing.
profile.name: Dr. Jiang
profile.quote: When we support the body's natural wisdom with ancient healing principles, profound transformation becomes possible.
profile.title: L.Ac., NCCAOM

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Dr. Henry Smith addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Dr. Henry Smith takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Dr. Henry Smith collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Dr. Henry Smith's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Dr. Henry Smith has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)
